public_process_constraints: history condition changes the initial latent distribution
continuation condition changes the transition kernel
the process is path dependent and not recoverable from the current occurrence alone
observable action events may affect later source transitions only through the registered interface
the source never reads model-internal state or evaluator scores
balance_rule: equal counts across the 2 history by 4 continuation condition grid within each split

visibility.development: public after model-freeze commit and source-instance freeze
visibility.stability: evaluator-only and used once after primary evaluation

authority_note: Performance on this source is source-conditional synthetic adequacy and is not human-empirical support.
